name: Black & White Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread marshmallow cream or scatter mini-marshmallows over the bottom of the prepared crust. Set aside.
2. In a blender, sprinkle unflavored gelatin over cold milk. Let stand for 2 minutes.
3. Add hot milk to the blender and process at low speed until gelatin is completely dissolved, about 2 minutes.
4. Add cream cheese, sugar, cocoa powder, and vanilla (if using) to the blender. Process at high speed until blended.
5. Gently pour the batter into the prepared crust.
6. Chill until firm, about 2 hours.
